session.assistant: Let me read some of the key test files to show the specific imports:
session.tool_result:
1→"""Tests for PlanDataProvider routing logic. 2→ 3→Tests verify that fetch_plans() routes queries to the correct service: 4→- Queries with "erk-objective" label use objective_list_service 5→- All other queries use plan_list_service 6→""" 7→ 8→from unittest.mock import MagicMock 9→ 10→from erk.tui.data.types import PlanFilters 11→from erk_shared.gateway.plan_data_provider.real import RealPlanDataProvider 12→ 13→ 14→def _make_provider( 15→ objective_service: MagicMock | None = None, 16→ plan_service: MagicMock | None = None, 17→) -> RealPlanDataProvider: 18→ """Create a RealPlanDataProvider with mocked services.""" 19→ mock_ctx = MagicMock() 20→ mock_objective_service = objective_service or MagicMock() 21→ mock_plan_service = plan_service or MagicMock() 22→ mock_ctx.objective_list_service = mock_objective_service 23→ mock_ctx.plan_list_service = mock_plan_service 24→ mock_objective_service.get_objective_list_data.return_value = MagicMock(plans=[]) 25→ mock_plan_service.get_plan_list_data.return_value = MagicMock(plans=[]) 26→ 27→ return RealPlanDataProvider( 28→ mock_ctx, 29→ location=MagicMock(), 30→ clipboard=MagicMock(),
... [180 lines omitted] ...

... [25 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Tests for FakePlanDataProvider.fetch_plans_for_objective().""" 2→ 3→from erk_shared.gateway.plan_data_provider.fake import FakePlanDataProvider, make_plan_row 4→ 5→ 6→def test_fetch_plans_for_objective_filters_by_objective_issue() -> None: 7→ """Only returns plans matching the given objective_issue.""" 8→ plans = [ 9→ make_plan_row(100, "Plan A", objective_issue=8088), 10→ make_plan_row(101, "Plan B", objective_issue=8036), 11→ make_plan_row(102, "Plan C", objective_issue=8088), 12→ make_plan_row(103, "Plan D"), # No objective 13→ ] 14→ provider = FakePlanDataProvider(plans=plans) 15→ 16→ result = provider.fetch_plans_for_objective(8088) 17→ 18→ assert len(result) == 2 19→ assert {r.plan_id for r in result} == {100, 102} 20→ 21→ 22→def test_fetch_plans_for_objective_returns_empty_when_no_match() -> None: 23→ """Returns empty list when no plans match the objective.""" 24→ plans = [ 25→ make_plan_row(100, "Plan A", objective_issue=8088), 26→ make_plan_row(101, "Plan B", objective_issue=8036), 27→ ] 28→ provider = FakePlanDataProvider(plans=plans) 29→ 30→ result = provider.fetch_plans_for_objective(9999)
... [17 lines omitted] ...
